allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./src/lib/i18n/messages/adminAuth.js'\).then\(m=>{const a=m.adminAuth;const langs=['de','en','fr','it'];const de=Object.keys\(a.de\).sort\(\);let ok=true;for\(const l of langs\){const k=Object.keys\(a[l]\).sort\(\);if\(k.length!==de.length\){console.log\('LENGTH MISMATCH',l,k.length,'vs de',de.length\);ok=false;}for\(const key of de\){if\(!\(key in a[l]\)\){console.log\('MISSING in',l,':',key\);ok=false;}}}console.log\(ok?'ALL KEYS MATCH across 4 langs \('+de.length+' keys each\)':'KEY MISMATCH'\);}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('IMPORT ERROR',e.message\);process.exit\(1\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/lib/i18n/messages/studentMain.js'\).then\(m => { const langs=['de','en','fr','it']; const keys=Object.keys\(m.studentMain.de\); console.log\('Keys per lang:', langs.map\(l=>l+':'+Object.keys\(m.studentMain[l]\).length\).join\(' '\)\); let ok=true; for\(const l of langs\){const k=Object.keys\(m.studentMain[l]\); if\(k.length!==keys.length\){ok=false;console.log\('MISMATCH',l\);} for\(const key of keys\){if\(!\(key in m.studentMain[l]\)\){ok=false;console.log\('MISSING',l,key\);}}} console.log\(ok?'ALL KEYS CONSISTENT':'INCONSISTENT'\); }\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('PARSE ERROR',e.message\);process.exit\(1\);}\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./src/lib/i18n/messages/teacherA.js'\).then\(m => { const {teacherA}=m; const langs=Object.keys\(teacherA\); const ref=Object.keys\(teacherA.de\).sort\(\); let ok=true; for\(const l of langs\){ const k=Object.keys\(teacherA[l]\).sort\(\); if\(JSON.stringify\(k\)!==JSON.stringify\(ref\)\){ ok=false; console.log\('MISMATCH',l\); const miss=ref.filter\(x=>!k.includes\(x\)\); const extra=k.filter\(x=>!ref.includes\(x\)\); console.log\(' missing:',miss\); console.log\(' extra:',extra\);} } console.log\(ok?'ALL 4 LANGS KEY-IDENTICAL \('+ref.length+' keys each\)':'KEY MISMATCH'\); }\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('IMPORT FAIL',e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {translations} from './src/lib/i18n/translations.js'; const c=Object.fromEntries\(Object.keys\(translations\).map\(l=>[l,Object.keys\(translations[l]\).length]\)\); console.log\(c\); const de=new Set\(Object.keys\(translations.de\)\); for\(const l of ['en','fr','it']\){console.log\(l,'missing',[...de].filter\(k=>!\(k in translations[l]\)\).length\);}")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {translations} from './src/lib/i18n/translations.js'; const de=new Set\(Object.keys\(translations.de\)\); console.log\('de',translations.de['login.demo']?'ok':'MISS'\); for\(const l of ['en','fr','it']\){console.log\(l,'missing',[...de].filter\(k=>!\(k in translations[l]\)\).length\);}")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {translations} from './src/lib/i18n/translations.js'; const c=Object.fromEntries\(Object.keys\(translations\).map\(l=>[l,Object.keys\(translations[l]\).length]\)\); console.log\(c\); const de=new Set\(Object.keys\(translations.de\)\); for\(const l of ['en','fr','it']\){console.log\(l,'missing',[...de].filter\(k=>!\(k in translations[l]\)\).length\);} console.log\('dp.title:', translations.en['dp.title'],'|',translations.fr['dp.title'],'|',translations.it['dp.title']\);")
Bash(awk -F'[:,]' '{r+=$2; f+=$4; e+=$6; s+=$8} END {print "TOTAL Tests run:"r" Failures:"f" Errors:"e" Skipped:"s}')
